_comment: Master spec page 18.4/18.5 layout for WVR-SV / WVB-SV / WVR-AL-SV combinations. Pos 1-3 in {1A7, 1A8, 1D7, 1D8, 1H7, 1H8, 1K7, 1L7, 1M7, 3A7, 3A8, 4D7, 4D8}. Pos 4-5 = set pressure (numeric bar or range code). Pos 6 = nominal pressure (B=PS25 here, not C). Pos 7-8 may be alphanumeric for dual DN encoding (WV-DN / SV-DN). Source: Erik Jacob email 2026-05-19.

pos6_nominalPressure._doc: Pos 6 nominal pressure for dual combinations — combined with handwheel/cap option per master spec page 18.4.

pos78_dualDn._doc: Pos 7-8 encodes the dual DN (WV inlet DN / SV outlet DN). Two-character codes; alphanumeric values used for compound encoding. Values inferred from examples; full table to be confirmed.

11.labelEn: DN20/32 (WVR inlet DN20, SV outlet DN32)

pos45_setPressure._doc: Pos 4-5 = set pressure in bar. Numeric (e.g. '10' = 10 bar, '16' = 16 bar, '20' = 20 bar). For half-bar pressures the 17-char extended form is used (see safety valves).
